title: K Raheja Corp is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: K Raheja Corp is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
K Raheja Corp has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About K Raheja Corp:
K Raheja Corp is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp!
